results.rendered_html:
saṃ-√tuṣ P. -tuṣyati, to feel quite satisfied or contented, be pleased or delighted with, have great pleasure in (instr.; -tuṣya ind. ‘with joy, joyful’),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c. :
Caus. -toṣayati (mc. also ˚te), to make well satisfied or contented, propitiate, please, rejoice or present with (instr.)

results.rendered_html:
saṃtuṣ 4 P.
1 To be pleased, satisfied or contented; saṃtuṣṭo bhāryayā bhartā bhartrā bhāryā tathaiva ca  Ms. 3. 60 ;  Bh. 3. 5 ;  Bg. 3. 17. 
2 To have great pleasure in.
— Caus.
1 To satisfy, please, gratify.
2 To present with (anything).
